successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Curated from official Association of Former Students of Texas A&M pages for the 2026 Distinguished Alumnus Award honorees, prioritizing person-specific recognition with explicit class-year evidence and substantive leadership or career impact stated on official pages.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Extracted from official Aggie Network / Association of Former Students pages announcing and listing 2026 Distinguished Alumnus Award honorees.

items.name: Robert E. "Bob" Jordan
items.bio: The Association of Former Students of Texas A&M lists Robert E. "Bob" Jordan '85 as CEO of Southwest Airlines and names him a 2026 Distinguished Alumnus honoree.
items.description: Southwest Airlines CEO and 2026 Texas A&M Distinguished Alumnus honoree.
items.confirmation_label: Official Aggie Network Distinguished Alumni page
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Association of Former Students page explicitly lists Jordan as '85 and CEO of Southwest Airlines; the official 2026 honoree announcement also confirms his class year and college affiliation.
